economic_notes: GBEs include Atli Resources Corporation, Atli Resources LP, Kwagis Power LP (25% interest, 41.5MW run-of-river hydro), Namgis Sand & Gravel Ltd, Orca Sand & Gravel LP (12% interest), Kuterra LP (ceased operations Feb 2020, facility leased to third party), Mama'omas LP, Danyas Forest Products LP (49.5%), Namgis Business Development Corporation, NBDC Real Estate LP, NBDC Real Estate Inc. Share of net income from business enterprises was $5,253,171. Orca Sand & Gravel community benefit fund at $2,665,751. Kwagis community benefit fund at $273,019.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Province is BC. Nation has 6 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 13 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Large surplus driven in part by $5.25M share of GBE net income. expenses_housing combines Social Housing Fund ($155,304) and Capital Projects & Revolving Housing Fund ($1,037,692). No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. CMHC deferred revenue of $1,678,693 is unusual and relates to new activity. total_government_transfers includes ISC $8,844,209 + FNHA $4,668,009 + Fisheries & Oceans $3,812,613 + Province of BC $3,538,200 + CMHC $635,961 + Other Federal Grants $1,705,517 + FNESC $453,586 + NVIAATS $165,507 + Nimpkish Fisheries Service $22,500 + Municipal services $125,255 = $23,971,357; however Nimpkish Fisheries and Municipal services may not be government transfers, so conservative estimate used. osr calculated as total revenue minus total_government_transfers.
